varieties.name: Duchesse de Brabant
varieties.traits: Tea Rose; Shell-pink, cupped, double blooms in clusters. Grows to 2m tall. Red new foliage adds charm.
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent - continuous blooming, small group ensures flowers all year long
varieties.availability: Queensland nurseries, climbing form also available. Also known as 'Montville Rose', 'Countess Bertha', 'Comtesse de Lambarthe'

varieties.name: Softee
varieties.traits: Miniature Rose; Apricot-lemon buds open to creamy white flowers. Very few thorns. Healthy foliage.

varieties.name: The Fairy
varieties.traits: Polyantha Rose; Pink rosette flowers in large clusters. Very shiny green foliage. Sometimes called 'Alice in Wonderland' rose.

varieties.name: Iceberg
varieties.traits: Floribunda; Pure white blooms in prolific clusters. Vigorous growth habit.
varieties.yield_notes: Exceptional - one of the longest flowering roses
varieties.availability: Widely available in all Queensland nurseries. Pink Iceberg sport also available.

varieties.name: Mr Lincoln (Mister Lincoln)
varieties.traits: Hybrid Tea; Deep red velvety petals. Long stems, strong sweet fragrance. Classic single straight-stemmed rose.

varieties.name: Knock Out Series
varieties.traits: Shrub Rose; Available in various colors (red, pink, coral). Disease-resistant, low-maintenance.

varieties.name: Damask Rose (Rosa damascena) 🏆
varieties.origin: Ancient (pre-1000 AD), Damascus/Middle East, cultivated in India since Mughal times
varieties.traits: Heritage Damask; Light to moderate pink/light red flowers. Deciduous shrub to 2.2m. Densely armed with curved prickles. Highly fragrant.
varieties.yield_notes: Good - flowers twice yearly in tropical climates (February-March and October-November)

varieties.name: Pusa Series - Indian Agricultural Research Institute Varieties
Ashwini 🌱
varieties.origin: IARI (Indian Agricultural Research Institute), New Delhi
varieties.traits: Hybrid Tea / Indian Cultivar; Dark red colored variety. High anthocyanin content (highest total phenolic content 427.59 mg GAE/100g).

varieties.name: Pusa Arun 🌱
varieties.traits: Hybrid Tea / Indian Cultivar; Red/pink variety. High anthocyanin content with cyanidin 3,5-di-O-glucoside as predominant constituent.

varieties.name: Arunima 🌱
varieties.traits: Hybrid Tea / Indian Cultivar; Light pink variety. Well-distinguished cultivar.
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent - highest average flowers harvested (43 flowers/plant/season)

varieties.name: Old Blush (Parsons' Pink China)
varieties.origin: China, pre-10th century, introduced to Europe 1789
varieties.traits: China Rose; Semi-double pink rose. Nearly thornless. Silver pink to light lilac pink, deepens as flower ages. Upright shrub with matt green leaves.
varieties.yield_notes: Exceptional - continuous bloom from spring to frost, called 'Monthly Rose'
varieties.availability: Heritage rose nurseries, increasingly available in India. Parent of numerous modern roses.

varieties.name: Mutabilis (Butterfly Rose)
varieties.origin: China (ancient), introduced to Europe via Reunion before 1874
varieties.traits: China/Tea hybrid; Large single flowers that change color as they age: buff-yellow → copper-pink → crimson. Nearly thornless. Purplish young foliage. Grows 6-10 feet (some to 20 feet in warm climates).
varieties.yield_notes: Exceptional - vigorous, prolific bloomer from summer to fall
varieties.availability: Heritage rose nurseries, increasingly popular in warm climate regions. Award of Garden Merit (RHS).
